title: MPBSE MP Board Result: Results declared; 73.42% pass Class 10, 76.01% pass Class 12; check list of toppers
description: MP Board Result MPBSE highlights: The results of the Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education (MPBSE) High School and Higher Secondary exams have been declared by CM Mohan Yadav at 11 am. The results have been declared at mpbse.mponline.gov.in and the list of toppers has also been released.
